QuestName: In Service Of The Lich King
Comment: DB-verified: giver The Lich King (25462), map 609. No objective (talk quest).

QuestName: In Service Of The Lich King
Comment: Ender Instructor Razuvious (28357), map 609. Coord from the tested EasyQuest reference profile (Questfiles/DK/Part 1) - the DB creature spawn (2498,-5593) was ~50y off.
Loot GO 190584 'Battle-worn Sword' -> item 38607. 18 spawns on map 609; go to spot + interact nearest (from tested reference profile).
Use 38607 (on-use spell 51769) at spot -> emblazons into 38631 'Runebladed Sword' (the RequiredItem). Wait 11s for the cast (from tested reference profile).
Equip 38707 'Runed Soulblade' (reward of 12619), /use Runeforging -> create -> apply. Macro sequence from tested reference (Part 1, q12842). No DB objective; done = quest complete-in-log.
Repeatedly interact GO 191582 'Acherus Soul Prison' (1 spawn near coord) -> drains Unworthy Initiates with the equipped runeblade until complete-in-log. From tested reference (Part 1, q12848).

DB creature_queststarter: giver Instructor Razuvious (28357) - NOT the Lich King (wowhead is wrong for this server). quest_template: QuestSortID -372, PrevQuest 12848, NextQuest 12641. Pure 'Report to the Lich King' talk quest (no objective) - like 12593. The Eye FLIGHT belongs to 12641, not this quest.
DB creature_questender: ender The Lich King (25462). Report quest -> turns in directly.
DB creature_queststarter: giver The Lich King (25462). quest_template: QuestSortID -372, PrevQuest 12636, NextQuest 12657.

VEHICLE quest. 4 analyze objectives (DB RequiredNpcOrGo1-4): 28525 Forge, 28543 Town Hall, 28542 Scarlet Hold, 28544 Chapel. Recipe hardcoded in RunEyeOfAcherus (ported from tested reference Part 1 q12641): control GO 191609 @ this pos -> buff 51852 -> fly to each objective point -> siphon 51859 -> return 52694. Coords here = the control mechanism.
DB creature_questender: ender The Lich King (25462). RunGossip ejects the Eye first if still possessing.

DB creature_queststarter: giver The Lich King (25462). quest_template: PrevQuest 12641, NextQuest 12850, no kill objective ('Use the glowing transporter behind the Lich King to reach Highlord Darion Mograine in the Hall of Command').

Walk into the glowing transporter behind the Lich King (no interact) -> teleports DOWN to the Hall of Command (~Z377). Direction-agnostic: TargetZ = destination level, arrival = |Me.Z - TargetZ| < band. Pauses WRobot teleport-detection so the drop doesn't stop the bot, then StopMoves the residual path so we don't run back up (Talamin). Reverse (up) ride = just a new ride-transporter step with its own Path + TargetZ, no code change. Path from tested reference Part 1 q12657.
DB creature_questender: ender Highlord Darion Mograine (28444) in the Hall of Command (lower level).

Comment: DB: giver AND ender = Lord Thorval (28472) in the Hall of Command. quest_template method 0, no objectives, PrevQuest 12657, NextQuest 0 - an optional training/info quest (accept+complete at Thorval). GossipPickupQuest handles gossip-offered/autocomplete quests.

QuestName: The Power Of Blood, Frost And Unholy
Comment: DB creature_questender: ender Lord Thorval (28472). Same NPC as giver - instant no-objective quest.
DB creature_queststarter: giver Highlord Darion Mograine (28444). quest_template: PrevQuest 12657, NextQuest 12670, no kill objective ('Report to Scourge Commander Thalanor at the balcony').
DB creature_questender: ender Scourge Commander Thalanor (28510) on the balcony. Turning in requisitions the Scourge gryphon to Death's Breach (that flight belongs to the next quest, 12670).
DB creature_queststarter: giver Scourge Commander Thalanor (28510). quest_template: PrevQuest 12850, NextQuest 12678, no kill objective ('Report to Prince Valanar at Death's Breach').

Ride the Scourge Gryphon (29488, a Taxi NPC) via gossip option 1 down to Death's Breach (~Z154). NPC pos + option from the tested reference (Part 1 q12670). Smooth flight -> no teleport guard. Done = |Me.Z - 154| < band.
DB creature_questender: ender Prince Valanar (28377) at Death's Breach. Report quest -> travelling to him crosses the arrival and turns in.

QuestName: If Chaos Drives, Let Suffering Hold The Reins
Comment: WAVE pickup 1/4. DB giver Prince Valanar (28377). Kill: 10x Scarlet Crusader/Peasant + 10x Citizen of Havenshire.
WAVE pickup 2/4. DB giver Salanar the Horseman (28653). Vehicle quest (steal a horse) - objective + turn-in built later; picked up now so we grab all 4 at once (Talamin).

WAVE pickup 3/4. DB giver Olrun the Battlecaller (29047). Duel quest (challenge npc 28406) - accepting does NOT start the duel (reference separates pickup from duel), so it is safe to batch. Objective + turn-in built later.
WAVE pickup 4/4. DB giver Orithos the Sky Darkener (28647). GATHER quest: recover 15 Saronite Arrows (GO 190691) in the Havenshire fields - same area as 12678.

GATHER FIRST (Talamin): loot 15 Saronite Arrows (GO 190691). NO TargetEntries on purpose - RunPatrol checks mobs before GOs, so a combined kill+gather never reached the arrows (fields are always full of mobs). Here we go for arrows and only fight what aggros. 12679's own hotspots (reference Part 2). Done = 12679 complete-in-log.

QuestName: If Chaos Drives, Let Suffering Hold The Reins
Comment: THEN the kills: 28557 Scarlet Peasant (-> obj1 'Scarlet Crusader slain') + 28576 Citizen of Havenshire (-> obj2). 12678's own hotspots (reference Part 2). Done = 12678 complete-in-log.

QuestName: If Chaos Drives, Let Suffering Hold The Reins
Comment: DB ender Prince Valanar (28377) at Death's Breach.
DB ender Orithos the Sky Darkener (28647).

Steal a Havenshire Stallion (28605) in the fields -> mounted (aura 52263) -> ride to Salanar (28653) and /cast Deliver Stolen Horse + /leavevehicle. Recipe hardcoded in RunStealHorse (tested reference Part 2 q12680). Objective count 1. Done = complete-in-log. NoCombat: the combat states stand down for the whole ride (Talamin: rein und raus, kein Kampf).
DB creature_questender: ender Salanar the Horseman (28653) at Death's Breach.

One-shot: we now own the Acherus Deathcharger (reward of Grand Theft Palomino) -> tell WRobot to ride it for all further travel (GroundMountName + UseGroundMount + Save). Like the reference Part 2 launcher. Satisfied once the setting sticks.

COMBAT quest: win 5 duels vs Death Knight Initiates (28406). RunDuel challenges the nearest one (gossip option 1) near the Death's Breach centre, dismounts, then Fight.StartFight - the fightclass wins. Objective 29025 x5. Recipe from tested reference Part 2 q12733. Done = complete-in-log.
DB creature_questender: ender Olrun the Battlecaller (29047). Turn in via gossip once the 5 duels are won.

QuestId 0 in JSON = resolved at runtime. Done = IsQuestDone(race quest).
